title: PARENT-ACTIVITY (15s) — Papa+Sara+Eva sandcastle research base build (locked positions)
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep12-c13-build. Animate the still gently — every figure stays in their EXACT physical kneeling spot throughout the entire 15s, no character ever stands up, walks, crosses to another spot, or reaches across. Only arms move in place. There are EXACTLY 3 people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional spawns. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa softly pats sand against the castle wall with both hands. Sara softly tilts her bucket and pours a tiny stream of dry sand onto the wall. Eva softly digs in the moat-shaped depression with both her hands. Papa (warm cheerful sing-song dad-voice): "Big walls comin' up!" Sara (cheerful kid-voice): "Smooth them down!" Eva (cheerful giggle): "Bigger moat!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva softly lifts her empty plastic bucket with both hands and pretends to dump it the wrong direction, deadpan, looking at her own bucket with cute confusion. Sara giggles softly with both hands still on her bucket. Papa softly lifts both his hands off the wall in a comic palms-up shrug-gesture. Eva (cute deadpan): "...wrong moat." Papa (warm theatrical comic gasp): "Oh, is THAT how it is?!" (BEAT 3 — 10-15s) A small thin twig with a tiny rectangular paper flag reading 'RESCUE' appears softly planted at the very top of the castle wall. Papa softly raises both his hands in a celebration gesture. Sara softly raises both her hands above her bucket cheering. Eva softly raises both her hands above her empty bucket cheering. All three giggle warmly. Eva (cheerful warm cheer): "PHASE ONE — DONE!" All three keep kneeling on both knees in their exact same spot from second 0 through second 15. Cheerful warm kid-show family-comedy lighting. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing, no shifting, no color drift.
